name: promptgoblin-scan-functions
description: Prompt Goblin tiered free-scan backend (DigitalOcean Functions).

scripts.test: npm run sync && node test/scan.test.js && node test/scan-index.test.js && node test/scan-tier2-auto.test.js && node test/verify-citations.test.js && node test/scan-regression.test.js
scripts.invoke:tier1: npm run sync && node test/invoke-local.js tier1
scripts.invoke:tier2: npm run sync && node test/invoke-local.js tier2
